combined_text:
--- Main Page ---
East Nashville Beer Works
Great Beer and Pizza. Tennessee's most family and dog friendly brewery. Stop by, unwind, and enjoy.
East Nashville - Trinity Lane
Our OG taproom on Trinity Lane, Great beer and pizza, HUGE Outdoor space, and a playground for families.
Learn More
Food Menu
Facebook
Twitter
Instagram
Wilson County
Visit our brand new taproom in Lebanon, two-stories, huge beer garden and LED screen for games, playground, dog park too!
Open every day at 11am.
Learn More
Food Menu
Facebook
Twitter
Instagram
Approachable beers, balanced and bright flavors. Available on draft and in
cans throughout Tennessee. Click to see what’s on tap in our taprooms and
learn more about the beer we brew.
See Them All
Beer Club
For taproom regulars, we have a Lifetime Beer Club! Learn more about
benefits and how to join.
Learn More
Beer Truck
We have a beer truck! You may have seen it at our Shelby Pop-Up Beer
Garden series. Learn more about where to find the truck and how to book.
Learn More

--- Page: /about-us ---
East Nashville Beer Works
East Nashville Beer Works began as an idea in 2015, to create something different in Nashville. A brewery that was all about the taproom experience for YOU, the customer. A brewery that brewed amazing beer, but also a taproom that was welcoming to all, family friendly, dog friendly, had food, outdoor space, and was just FUN!
We love East Nashville, we love Lebanon, and are all about community and bringing people to our taprooms. We are in the "good times" business. If you come here, YOU WILL HAVE A GOOD TIME, and we will see to it. The beer, the pizza, the good vibes, it's a can't miss.
ENBW is often described as "next-level" family friendly and dog friendly with our beer, expansive beer garden (now featuring a playground area) and full food menu, the taproom has become a central gathering place and hosted hundreds of events. In 2024, we expanded our concept in a BIG way, opening our Wilson County Taproom 30 minutes east in Lebanon, TN. We'll be brewing at both locations, and have two awesome taprooms now!
Being a "Community" is one of our core values, and our motto is "Beer is Community" for this reason. No matter what facet of our operations, whether bringing in groups to have their special events here, collaborating with different breweries in town, or purchasing local supplies like our honey for "Miro Miel" or Diskin Cider for our taproom, we strive for community. We hope you become a part of it.
The People: East Nashville Beer Works was founded by former Nashville Councilmember Anthony Davis, and opened to the public August 6th, 2016.
Our brewery full time staff includes:
Brew Team
President: Anthony Davis
VP of Brewing Ops: Mitch Crain
Lead Brewer (Trinity Lane): Alec Ross
Lead Brewer (Wilson County): Seth Green
Warehouse and Packaging: Chris Bohn
Cellarman: Dillon Slaughter
Beer Rep: Evan Hipps
Trinity Team
Trinity Taproom GM: Bailey Lanzilotta
Trinity Kitchen Lead: Shane Stoltzfus
Wilson County Team
Wilson County GM: Hannah Hendrixson
Wilson County AGM: John O'Malley
Wilson County Kitchen Lead: Ericka Niese
Our bar and kitchen staff are amazing as well, and will be taking great care of you in the taproom.
You will always find wonderful and willingly helpful staff to make your visit fun and enjoyable. Make us part of your visit to Nashville, or stop by if you are local and haven't made it out yet. Beer is Community.

meta.meta_description: East Nashville Beer Works is a community and family-friendly brewery in Nashville, TN. Enjoy our craft beers, food, and events!
